context: Kim Trade Services employee expense reimbursement policy. Applies to the 6-person firm (Jason Kim, Pat Delgado, Brandon Kim, Marcus Webb, Priya Anand, Donna Schaefer).

validation_rules.notes: Receipts emailed to donna.schaefer@Finthesiss.ai within 30 days of purchase.
validation_rules.requirement: Itemized receipt required for any expense over $25.

validation_rules.notes: Approval by Jason Kim for travel to client sites and trade conferences.
validation_rules.requirement: Travel and lodging must be pre-approved before booking.

validation_rules.action: Reimburse at IRS standard mileage rate
validation_rules.notes: Mileage logged for client site visits in the Columbus and Toledo regions.
validation_rules.requirement: Personal vehicle mileage reimbursed at the current IRS standard rate.

validation_rules.action: Cap meal reimbursement at policy per diem
validation_rules.notes: Per diem applies to overnight travel for CBP and trade compliance training.
validation_rules.requirement: Meals reimbursed up to $60 per diem on overnight business travel.

validation_rules.notes: Processed by Donna Schaefer with payroll; deposited to employee bank on file.
validation_rules.requirement: Approved reimbursements paid within 15 business days.
